issues.detail: The skill examples focus on happy paths and do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Hardcoded admin credentials in the authentication example expose sensitive information.

scenarios.name: Streaming GPT-4 chatbot with conversation history via gr.ChatInterface
scenarios.rationale: Baseline returns a single completion without streaming; treatment iterates stream chunks with yield and reconstructs history pairs into messages as documented.

scenarios.name: CSV uploader returning summary text plus downloadable summary CSV
scenarios.rationale: Baseline misses the (text, file) tuple output and file.name access pattern; treatment matches the documented dual-output gr.Interface with pandas describe written to /tmp.
